Platform Features

Everything you need to
eliminate payment risk

Six powerful modules that work together to give you complete payment intelligence before every order.

Order Simulator
Model the financial impact of accepting an order before committing. See risk-adjusted return, delay cost, and working capital exposure in real time.
AI Powered
Buyer Risk Profiles
Deep risk scoring for every buyer — payment history, delay patterns, overdue invoices, and credit recommendations in one intelligent dashboard.
360° View
Payment Behaviour Intelligence
Detect early warning signals in buyer payment patterns. Track delay trends, on-time rates, and behavioural shifts before they become bad debt.
Early Warning
Trade Agreements
Digitize and enforce commercial commitments. Set credit limits, payment terms, and penalties that both parties agree to and the system tracks automatically.
Enforceable
Buyer Clusters
Segment your buyers by geographic and industry risk. Discover which clusters are safe for growth and which require tighter credit controls.
Geo + Industry
Predictive Alerts
Get AI-generated early warnings before payment issues occur. Proactively act on collection, credit reduction, or order holds before defaults materialize.
Proactive
How It Works

From data to decision
in four steps

No complex setup. No data science team required. Just upload your data and let the AI do the rest.

Step 01
Upload Buyer & Invoice Data
Import your existing buyer data, invoice history, and payment records. Supports CSV, Excel, and direct entry.
Step 02
AI Analyzes Payment Behaviour
Our AI engine processes historical patterns, calculates delay probabilities, and generates risk profiles for each buyer.
Step 03
Receive Risk Scores & Recommendations
Get actionable insights: risk scores, credit limits, recommended trade terms, and real-time alerts for each buyer.
Step 04
Make Better Credit Decisions
Approve, hold, or modify orders with confidence. Protect working capital and grow revenue without increasing risk.
AI Insights Engine — Live Analysis
⚠️
Payment Risk
Buyer has an 82% probability of delayed payment based on 14 historical invoices and worsening trend.
💡
Recommendation
Recommended credit term: 30 days instead of 60 days — reducing exposure from ₹28.5L to ₹14.2L.
📊
Exposure Alert
Accepting this order may increase your total exposure by 42%, pushing utilization above the safe threshold.
✅
Opportunity
Sharma Exports has a 96% on-time rate. Safe to increase credit limit by ₹10L to grow order volume.
AI Intelligence

Your AI payment
analyst, always on

CashFlowIQ's AI engine continuously analyzes buyer behaviour and surfaces critical insights before problems occur.

Real-time Risk Scoring Every buyer gets a dynamic risk score that updates with each new invoice and payment event.
Predictive Delay Forecasting Know which invoices are likely to be paid late — weeks before the due date.
Proactive Alerts Get notified when buyer behaviour changes so you can act before the damage is done.

Why CashFlowIQ

Built for Indian B2B businesses

🚨
Reduce Bad Debts

Identify high-risk buyers before extending credit. Stop losses before they happen with predictive risk scoring.

📈
Improve Working Capital

Optimize credit terms and collection cycles to free up cash locked in receivables.

⏰
Predict Payment Delays

AI-powered trend analysis forecasts which buyers will pay late so you can act proactively.

🧠
Smarter Credit Decisions

Replace gut-feel with data. Set credit limits, approve orders, and negotiate terms backed by real buyer behavior.

FAQ

Frequently asked questions

Yes, absolutely. You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from your account settings. Upgrades take effect immediately; downgrades apply at the start of your next billing cycle.

Yes. The Growth plan comes with a 14-day free trial — no credit card required. You get full access to all Growth features so you can evaluate CashFlowIQ with your real buyer data.

ERP integrations (Tally, SAP, Oracle) are available as an add-on on Growth and are included natively in the Enterprise plan. We also support Excel and CSV imports on all plans for manual data workflows.

Yes. All data is encrypted at rest and in transit (AES-256 / TLS 1.3). We are SOC 2 Type II compliant and follow RBI data localisation guidelines. Your buyer data is never shared with third parties.

Pricing is per organization, not per user. Each plan includes a buyer limit. Enterprise pricing is custom and based on buyer volume, integrations required, and support tier. Contact our sales team for a tailored quote.
